settings.title: Freedom to Move
settings.body: Ergonomic, breathable, reflective. Harnesses built for everyday adventures.

settings.title: Frequently Asked Questions
settings.body: Everything you need to know about our collection.

settings.question: What sizes do you offer?
settings.answer: We offer XS through XL across most product lines. Each product page includes a detailed size guide with measurements and breed suggestions.

settings.question: How do I measure my pet?
settings.answer: Use a soft tape measure around the widest part of their neck for collars, or the deepest part of their chest for harnesses. See our sizing guide for breed-specific recommendations.

settings.question: What is your returns policy?
settings.answer: We offer a 30-day return policy on all non-personalised items. Items must be unused and in original packaging. Personalised items are final sale.

settings.question: How long does delivery take?
settings.answer: Standard delivery is 3–5 business days. Express delivery (1–2 days) is available at checkout. Free shipping on orders over $80.

settings.question: Are your products safe for puppies?
settings.answer: Yes! All PAWD products are designed with safety in mind. We recommend our adjustable ranges for growing puppies.

settings.question: Do you ship internationally?
settings.answer: Currently we ship within Australia. International shipping is coming soon — join our newsletter to be the first to know.
